Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class FailureHandler

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.FailureHandler
public class FailureHandler extends Object
Controls how assertion failures are reported. The default implementation throws immediately; SoftFailureHandler collects failures for batch reporting.

Custom messages (via Reality.checkWithMessage(...)) override the default failure message while preserving the expected/actual detail as context.
